name: Avon
description: Avon offers a Frozen Body Wash, which is a mild formula suitable for sensitive skin, enriched with aloe, chamomile, and vitamin E to gently cleanse and refresh. This product reflects the company's commitment to providing a wide range of beauty essentials.

name: WOW Skin Science India Ltd
description: BuyWOW offers a premium foaming body wash, the WOW Skin Science Valencia Orange & Ginger Foaming Body Wash, which features natural ingredients like Shea Butter, Ginger, and Orange Essential Oils, designed to leave your skin soft and rejuvenated.

name: European Wax Center
description: European Wax Center offers a fragrance-free body wash that prevents ingrown hairs, gently exfoliates, and keeps skin clean while minimizing hair regrowth between waxes.

name: Dr. Squatch
description: Dr. Squatch offers a Natural Body Wash for Men that comes in both exfoliating and non-exfoliating options, emphasizing a moisturizing formula enriched with natural ingredients. This focus on quality and craftsmanship sets their body wash apart from synthetic alternatives.

name: Avon Product
description: Skin So Soft Pure Nature offers the Black Suede Ultimate Body Wash, which features a rich lathering formula with soothing aloe, moisturizing glycerin, and vitamin E, designed to leave skin feeling clean and smooth.

name: Dermalogica
description: Dermalogica offers a Conditioning Body Wash, which is a rich, skin-conditioning botanical cleanser suitable for the entire body, highlighting the company's focus on professional-grade skin care products.

name: Birchbox
description: Birchbox offers a variety of premium beauty products, including the Awaken Body Wash, which is designed to enhance your skincare routine. Their customizable subscription service helps you discover products that cater to your preferences, ensuring you find items that make you look and feel great.

name: Woosh Washrooms
description: Woosh offers a range of wholesale hair and body wash products, including a luxury 5-litre body wash that is eco-friendly and gentle on the skin. Their commitment to high-quality and cost-effective solutions makes them a trusted partner for facilities managers and property agents across the UK.

name: Bluemercury
description: Bluemercury offers Dermalogica Conditioning Body Wash, a rich, soap-free gel that cleanses and moisturizes the skin, leaving it soft and silky.

name: Essential Wholesale
description: Essential Labs offers a Simple Body Wash that is sulfate-free, highlighting their commitment to natural and organic formulations. With over 20 years of experience, they provide custom formulation services and responsibly-sourced ingredients for various brands and DIY makers.
